hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Task completed!" with title "Claude Code"' && afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Hero.aiff
osascript -e 'display notification "I need your attention!" with title "Claude Code"' && afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff
osascript -e 'display notification "Waiting for your permission!" with title "Claude Code"' && afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Ping.aiff
